title: suberanthus neriifolius
intro: Suberanthus neriifolius is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Suberanthus neriifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Suberanthus neriifolius can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
